title: Phase 5: Seed data and local operations
description: Provide repeatable store-layout seed data and local DB lifecycle scripts.

title: T27 Implement seed script for default sections
description: Add seed command that inserts Produce, Meat, Deli, Bakery, A1-A11, Dairy, Frozen, Unknown with walk order and subcategories.
acceptance_criteria: Seeded DB contains complete expected section set and sort_order

title: T28 Make seed script re-runnable
description: Use upsert/ignore strategy to keep seed idempotent across repeated runs.
acceptance_criteria: Second seed run produces no duplicate rows

title: T29 Add DB lifecycle scripts
description: Add npm scripts for migrate, seed, and reset-dev-db workflow.
acceptance_criteria: Fresh clone can setup DB and run API with documented commands

title: Phase 3: Ingredients and alias resolution API
description: Implement ingredient CRUD, alias handling, and search/resolve behavior.

title: T16 Implement GET /api/ingredients list
description: Return ingredient list with optional section_id filter; include section name and aliases.
acceptance_criteria: Response includes aliases array and section metadata for each item

title: T17 Implement GET /api/ingredients/:id
description: Return one ingredient with joined section and aliases.
acceptance_criteria: Known id returns full object; unknown id returns 404

title: T18 Implement POST /api/ingredients
description: Create ingredient with name, section_id, optional aliases; auto-add canonical name as alias.
acceptance_criteria: Created ingredient always has canonical alias exactly once

title: T19 Implement PUT /api/ingredients/:id
description: Update ingredient fields and fully replace alias list in one transaction.
acceptance_criteria: Alias list replacement is atomic and reflects request exactly

title: T20 Implement DELETE /api/ingredients/:id
description: Delete ingredient and related aliases safely.
acceptance_criteria: Ingredient and all linked aliases are removed

title: T21 Implement GET /api/ingredients/search
description: Search case-insensitively across ingredient names and aliases using q param, with exact-match boost.
acceptance_criteria: Search finds canonical and alias hits and returns stable sorted matches

title: T22 Improve alias conflict messages
description: When alias already exists, include owning ingredient id and name in error details.
acceptance_criteria: Conflict response clearly identifies current alias owner

title: Phase 4: Batch operations
description: Implement batch create/update endpoint for sync workflows with per-item results.

title: T23 Define batch request and response schemas
description: Create Zod schemas for operations array with create/update actions and per-item result envelope.
acceptance_criteria: Invalid operations fail validation with precise error paths

title: T24 Implement batch processing service
description: Process operations with per-item transaction boundaries and collect success/error outcomes.
acceptance_criteria: One failed item does not rollback successful siblings

title: T25 Implement POST /api/ingredients/batch
description: Expose batch service endpoint for create/update operations and summary response.
acceptance_criteria: Endpoint returns created/updated counts and per-item errors

title: T26 Add idempotency guardrails for batch alias writes
description: Normalize/deduplicate alias inputs so repeated payloads do not create duplicates.
acceptance_criteria: Running same batch twice does not duplicate aliases

title: Phase 8: Deployment verification and handoff
description: Validate VPS deployment workflow and write operational handoff docs.
close_reason: Phase 8 deployment verification and handoff complete

title: T37 Perform VPS deployment dry run
description: Deploy container using compose settings to VPS environment and verify API availability.
acceptance_criteria: Remote health check and sample CRUD calls succeed
notes: Docker/Compose unavailable in this environment (docker command missing). Completed closest deployment verification by building dist, running init+server with deployment env vars, and validating health plus sample section/ingredient CRUD with 200/201/204 responses.
close_reason: Deployment dry run fallback completed and documented

title: T38 Write operations runbook
description: Document backup/restore of SQLite volume, restart process, and troubleshooting notes.
acceptance_criteria: Runbook covers routine operations and failure recovery
notes: Created docs/operations-runbook.md with deploy procedure, backup/restore steps for ingredient-db-data volume, restart operations, troubleshooting guidance, and phase-8 verification evidence/limitations.

title: T39 Closeout and sync beads state
description: Review open issues, close completed work, file follow-ups, and sync beads export.
acceptance_criteria: No completed tasks left open and bd sync --flush-only succeeds
notes: Reviewed ready queue for this phase, verified completed work items, and ran final quality gate (lint/typecheck/test/build). No additional follow-up issues were required for epic scope.

title: Phase 1: Database schema and data access
description: Implement SQLite schema, migrations, connection setup, and repository helpers.

title: T05 Define Drizzle schema for sections
description: Implement sections table with id UUID text PK, name text, sort_order int, subcategories JSON text.
acceptance_criteria: Generated schema includes required columns and types

title: T06 Define Drizzle schema for ingredients
description: Implement ingredients table with id UUID text PK, name text, section_id FK to sections.id.
acceptance_criteria: FK relationship compiles and migration emits constraint

title: T07 Define Drizzle schema for aliases
description: Implement aliases table with id UUID text PK, alias text unique, ingredient_id FK to ingredients.id.
acceptance_criteria: Unique alias and FK constraints are present

title: T08 Create initial migration and apply command
description: Generate migration for all tables and add npm script to run migrations.
acceptance_criteria: Fresh database migrates successfully with one command

title: T09 Implement DB connection module
description: Create sqlite connection module, enable PRAGMA foreign_keys, expose typed DB client.
acceptance_criteria: App startup initializes DB and FK enforcement is active

title: T10 Implement repository helpers
description: Add reusable data access helpers for section, ingredient, and alias CRUD operations.
acceptance_criteria: Helpers cover create/read/update/delete and are imported by routes

title: T11 Implement DB constraint error mapper
description: Map SQLite unique/FK violations to domain errors, including alias ownership conflict metadata.
acceptance_criteria: Duplicate alias and invalid section_id return mapped error types

title: Phase 6: Containerization and deployment config
description: Containerize API with persistent SQLite volume and compose config for local/VPS.

title: T30 Create production Dockerfile
description: Build and run API in container with configurable PORT and mounted DB path.
acceptance_criteria: docker build succeeds and container responds on health endpoint

title: T31 Create docker-compose for local/VPS
description: Define service, env vars, and persistent volume mount for SQLite file.
acceptance_criteria: Container restart preserves data and port mapping works

title: T32 Add deployment environment docs
description: Document required env vars and compose-based deploy/update steps for VPS Docker manager.
acceptance_criteria: Operator can deploy using docs without additional tribal knowledge

title: Phase 0: Project setup and workflow
description: Initialize runtime/tooling and beads workflow for the ingredient API project.

title: T01 Initialize Node+TS+H3 skeleton
description: Create project scaffold with TypeScript config, H3 server bootstrap, and a /health endpoint.
acceptance_criteria: npm run dev starts server and GET /health returns JSON 200

title: T02 Add baseline scripts and tooling
description: Add scripts for dev, build, start, lint, typecheck, and test; configure lint/format defaults.
acceptance_criteria: All scripts execute without errors on baseline project

title: T03 Capture architecture decisions in docs
description: Record accepted defaults: Drizzle + better-sqlite3, Zod, Vitest, per-item batch transactions, case-insensitive contains search with exact boost.
acceptance_criteria: README or docs note decisions and rationale in one section

title: T04 Create shared API error envelope
description: Define consistent JSON error response shape and helper for status code + message + details.
acceptance_criteria: All new routes can return standardized error payload

title: Phase 2: Sections API
description: Implement and validate CRUD endpoints for store sections.

title: T12 Implement GET /api/sections
description: Return all sections ordered by sort_order ascending.
acceptance_criteria: Endpoint returns JSON array in correct order

title: T13 Implement POST /api/sections
description: Validate payload and create section with name, sort_order, subcategories array.
acceptance_criteria: Valid payload returns 201; invalid payload returns 400 with field message

title: T14 Implement PUT /api/sections/:id
description: Update section name, sort_order, and subcategories with validation.
acceptance_criteria: Existing section updates successfully; unknown id returns 404

title: T15 Implement DELETE /api/sections/:id
description: Delete section and handle FK conflict when ingredients reference it.
acceptance_criteria: Unreferenced section deletes with 204; referenced section returns conflict error

title: Phase 7: Testing and quality gates
description: Add integration coverage for endpoints and enforce lint/typecheck/test/build gates.

title: T33 Add integration tests for sections endpoints
description: Cover sections CRUD success paths and validation/FK conflict failures.
acceptance_criteria: Test suite passes and verifies status codes + response shapes

title: T34 Add integration tests for ingredients endpoints
description: Cover ingredient CRUD, alias auto-add, full alias replacement, and delete cascade behavior.
acceptance_criteria: Tests assert canonical alias insertion and replacement semantics

title: T35 Add integration tests for search and batch
description: Cover case-insensitive search, alias matching, mixed-success batch outcomes, and duplicate alias conflicts.
acceptance_criteria: Tests validate per-item batch result contract

title: T36 Enforce quality gate command
description: Add a single script that runs lint, typecheck, test, and build in sequence.
acceptance_criteria: Quality gate script completes successfully on local run
